components.value: S, F (bell, chimes, gong, or cymbals) (such as studded leather armor or padded armor with armor spikes) are not affected. Creatures made of metal take the penalties described above on attack rolls , damage rolls, skill checks, and Reflex saves. description.value: You create a loud, resonating clangor that causes metallic objects to vibrate wildly. Affected creatures wielding metal weapons take a â1 penalty on attack rolls, while creatures using metallic tools take a â1 penalty on associated skill checks. Creatures wearing metal armor increase the armor check penalty of their armor by 1. These penalties increase by 1 at 8th caster level and every 4 caster levels thereafter (to a maximum of â4 at 16th level). To be affected by the spell, an item must be composed primarily of metal.
